content:
🔥 pywalium | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To dynamically theme the Chromium browser with colors generated by Pywal, ensuring a consistent color scheme across the user's operating system and browser.
✨ Key Features: • Generates Chromium themes using Pywal colors • Automates theme creation via a shell script • Easy integration with Chromium's developer mode • Requires re-execution on Pywal color changes
📖 Summary: Pywalium is a shell script that generates custom themes for the Chromium browser based on colors defined by the Pywal utility. It automates the process of applying dynamic color schemes to Chromium, allowing users to easily match their browser's appearance to their system's wallpaper or Pywal color palette.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
